faqs.question: Why do I have silverfish in my Hempstead home?
faqs.answer: Silverfish are attracted to moisture and humidity, which is common in Hempstead basements, bathrooms, and crawl spaces, especially in older homes. They feed on starches, paper products, and fabrics, making closets, attics, and storage areas prime habitats.
